steps.title: Follow the survival contrast
steps.content: After mastodons died out, cucurbits faced extinction because they lost a way to spread seeds. The “however” clause says Indigenous peoples began growing cucurbits, reversing that threat.

steps.title: Name the protected outcome
steps.content: Choice A means confirming, not preserving. Choice B means increasing in number, and Choice C means soothing, which does not fit plants facing extinction. The needed word means making survival certain. The answer is D.
